uplink.description: Status report — contact open, battery 3.0 V
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected authored from this repo's codec and cross-checked against the upstream reference decoder (Volt=3, status=1). Upstream status byte 1 -> contact 'open'.

uplink.description: Status report — contact closed, battery 3.6 V
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; status byte 0 -> contact 'closed'; upstream Volt=3.6.

uplink.description: Status report — low battery flag set (bit7), contact open
uplink._note: Synthetic frame: byte3 = 0x9E (158): bit7 set => low battery, 0x1E (30) => 3.0 V. Mirrors upstream's '(low battery)' annotation on Volt.

uplink.description: Device-info / startup version frame (reportType 0x00) — no measurement
uplink._note: Upstream decodes this as Device/SWver/HWver/Datecode (no measurement); normalized codec reports it as an error.

uplink.description: Config report response on fPort 7 — not a data report
uplink._note: fPort 7 carries config responses, not measurements; normalized codec rejects it.
